lint.notes: Next.js lint is deprecated but still passes with no ESLint warnings or errors

appliedUpdates.description: Created conventions.md documenting discovered patterns: middleware-based route protection, DefaultChatTransport usage for custom API context, parallel data fetching with Promise.all, server-side auth validation with getUser(), and JSONB playbook data structure

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add guidance about TDD approach: workers should write tests first before implementation, as demonstrated in playbook-submission feature which had 12 comprehensive tests covering form validation, step navigation, submission, and dynamic content - all written before the implementation.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: playbook-submission feature (worker session 6a56ea7c-2ff0-4bb9-9721-a60e11941275) successfully used TDD: 12 tests written first, then implementation, all passing at completion. Handoff indicates no deviations from procedure.

rejectedObservations.observation: Redundant playbook context addition in recovery flow - the recovery block conditionally adds verifiedPlaybooksContext but it's already been added earlier in the base system prompt
rejectedObservations.note: This was noted in the playbook-ai-integration review as non-blocking and slightly redundant. The code functions correctly, just has minor redundancy. Not worth a fix feature.

reviewDetails.summary: Playbook browse and detail pages fully implemented. /playbooks shows cards with CC, target school, major, transfer year, verification badges. Filters work for CC/target/major. Empty state displays when no matches. Verified/unverified badges visible on list and detail. /playbooks/[id] shows semester-by-semester breakdown with highlighted failure events. Share Your Story CTA links to /playbooks/submit. Navigation between plan view and playbooks works correctly.

4-step multi-step form at /playbooks/submit with auth protection via middleware and redirect-back support. Step 1: basic info with validation. Step 2: semester-by-semester courses. Step 3: failure events (optional). Step 4: outcome selection. Required fields show inline validation. After submission, playbook created with verification_status='pending' and confirmation shown with pending verification badge. Submitted playbook appears in /playbooks listing. 12 comprehensive tests covering all functionality.

Verified playbooks correctly integrated into AI system prompt. getVerifiedPlaybooksContext utility filters strictly for verification_status='verified' AND outcome='transferred'. Unverified playbooks never included. planContext passed via DefaultChatTransport to enable CC/target/major filtering. Parallel fetching of articulation, prerequisite, and playbook data. 11 new tests covering edge cases.

All routes reachable via visible UI elements. From /dashboard: can reach /plan/new (header + empty state CTA), /plan/[id] (plan cards), /playbooks (header nav), /playbooks/submit (Share Your Story CTA). Header nav present on all authenticated pages. No dead-end pages.

notes: All 4 implementation features in the playbooks milestone passed scrutiny review. No blocking issues found. Test suite is comprehensive with 242 tests. TypeScript and lint are clean. One new library file created to document discovered conventions.
